headline: Rovers Return
body: Rovers Return is being linked with a transfer.
text: If Manchester United build the new stadium on the newly acquired land, the nearest pub to the stadium will be the Rovers Return and you'll be able to see the stadium from Ken Barlow's  bedroom window.
draft_caption:
📡 ON THE RADAR | Rumours growing over Rovers Return testing the waters with a new club.

#FPLVortex #FootballNews
